name: konva

en.when_to_use: Use it to build an interactive canvas editor or diagram where users can select and transform objects (stage -> layer -> shape, built-in Transformer drag/resize/rotate handles, per-node events, and hit detection). Feed it a serialized scene tree for Konva.Node.create. For SVG import/serialization and image filters, use fabric from the catalog; for a scene graph plus node-event model, use konva.
en.why_valuable: Draggable, rotatable, resizable shapes plus Transformer handle UI, per-node hit detection, layers, and tweening make up a complete engine; AI produces very poor hit testing and transform handles when writing them by hand.

data_in.note: data.scene is a serialized Konva scene tree (input to Konva.Node.create, as produced by node.toObject()). The root must have className:'Stage', and attrs.width/height are required. Event handlers are not stored in JSON, but draggable/name attributes are restored; the consuming AI attaches interactions (Transformer/on).

scene.attrs: { width: number, height: number } -- Stage dimensions (required)
scene.children: Array -- Layer nodes: each { className:'Layer', children:[ shape nodes ] }

_shapeNode.attrs: { x, y, width, height, fill, stroke, draggable?, name? ... } -- name:'editable' lets Transformer select via layer.find('.editable')

schema.transform?: boolean -- attach Konva.Transformer (drag-resize-rotate handles) to nodes with name='editable'; default false

spec.note: Stage dimensions come from data.scene Stage attrs.width/height (boot may also set el.style.height as a fallback). For this canvas class, :host grows with content; do not use vh or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 要构建用户可选中/变换对象的交互式画布编辑器或图示(stage→layer→shape,内建 Transformer 拖拽-缩放-旋转手柄、逐节点事件与命中检测)时用它;喂 Konva.Node.create 的序列化场景树即出。要 SVG 导入/序列化与图像滤镜用目录里的 fabric;要的是 scene-graph + 节点事件模型则用 konva。
why_valuable: 可拖拽/可旋转/可缩放形状 + Transformer 手柄 UI + 逐节点命中检测 + 分层 + 补间是一整套引擎;AI 徒手写命中测试和变换手柄质量极差。

data_in.note: data.scene 是 Konva 序列化场景树(Konva.Node.create 的输入,即 node.toObject() 的产物);root 必须 className:'Stage' 且 attrs.width/height 必填。事件处理器不进 JSON,但 draggable/name 是 attr 会还原;交互(Transformer/on)由消费 AI 挂载。

scene.attrs: { width: number, height: number } —— Stage 尺寸(必填)
scene.children: Array —— Layer 节点:每个 { className:'Layer', children:[ 形状节点 ] }

_shapeNode.attrs: { x, y, width, height, fill, stroke, draggable?, name? ... } —— name:'editable' 便于 Transformer 按 layer.find('.editable') 选中

schema.transform?: boolean —— 为 name='editable' 的节点挂 Konva.Transformer(drag-resize-rotate 手柄),默认 false

spec.note: Stage 尺寸来自 data.scene 的 Stage attrs.width/height(boot 内也可 el.style.height 兜底);canvas 类,:host 撑高、禁 vh/百分比高。

uplink: 节点选中/拖拽/变换状态若需外传,由消费 AI 接 Konva 原生 node.on('dragend'|'transformend'|'click') 回调并按载体处理,本条不统一事件契约。

carriers.widget: supported:canvas 落容器/shadow,零全局样式;Transformer 手柄在 stage 内;v10 处理 shadow-root 指针 retarget
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + canvas,无 worker/wasm 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm default export 为 Konva 命名空间(grep: 'dr as default')。Stage 构造 new Konva.Stage({container: HTMLDivElement|string, width, height})(Stage.d.ts);声明式 Konva.Node.create(data:any, container?:any)(Node.d.ts static create)从序列化场景树 {attrs,className,children} 重建;Transformer 有 attachTo/setNodes/getNodes(Transformer.d.ts),bundle grep 见 Transformer(6)、draggable(7)。零全局足迹:+esm grep document.head=0、document.body=0——Konva 只在传入 container 内构建 div.konvajs-content + <canvas>,不注入全局 stylesheet。拖拽期的 window mousemove/mouseup 监听于 dragstart 加、dragend 清(非泄漏,故记 no)。容器作用域 → shadow 安全。
